caption:
Class Fees for this trimester 2, 2019/2020:- Interested?

For one class:
- RM 70 for member
- RM 75 for non member

There is total of 12 classes in this trimester for each fitness class. 
For classes falls on a public holiday or you're unable to attend, you are able to replace it in the other classes available in this trimester only. 😊

You can go to our fb page to do the registration. Besides, we will having our registration booth at MAIN HALL on this coming Wednesday & Thursday. You can come and visit and make your payment also. Our classes will be starting next week (Week 3). Pm us for any inquires. See you soon!!!
alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on November 25, 2019.

caption:
#NOTICE
Hi guys, here is information about ZUMBA CLASS :
Due to lack of participants, we are sad to inform that Zumba Class will be close in this trimester.

caption:
Hi guys, the Club and Societies Registration Week (CSRW) for November Intake 2021/2021 will be held on this coming Friday.
The information of the Club and Registration Week as below:
Date: 4th DEC 2020
Time: 2:30pm - 5:30pm
Live Stream Platform: SRC Multimedia University FB Page
Virtual Booth Platform: cutt.ly/aerobic
Come to our booth for more inquiries!!
See you soon!!!🥰

caption:
Hi guys!

It's finally the day of Registration Week. 😆

Are you guys ready to hype up your daily exercise routine?

Our booth will be located at the left side of the Main Hall (between taekwando and fencing club). You are welcome to register your fitness classes and join as a club member at our booth. See you guys soon! 😉

caption:

alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on February 06, 2020.

caption:
Greeting from Aerobics Club MMU. We will having our Annual General Meeting 2020! Below are the details of our AGM:
Date : 28/07/2020
Time : 6:30 P. M. 
Google Meet : Code [aerofit] 
The main purpose for having this AGM are introducing the roles of each division, the events that will be organised in this academic year. Come and join our gaming session and lucky draw to win some mysterious prizes! And most importantly, SAPS point will be given for those who attend this AGM.
Hope to see new blood soon!
See you there!!☺️
alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on July 25, 2020.

caption:
Good Days, Everyone😊
Here we have a good news for you all:

Aerobics Club have our own T-shirt right now.🎉 The colour is Tiffany blue😍. It is only RM25 for the beautiful T-shirt.

For those who are interested to buy, we have size xs-xl. The quantity is limited. First come first serve ya. Please support us ya. For more details please do not hesitate to pm us. Thank you🥰
alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on December 17, 2019.

caption:

Every Wednesday 6 -7pm ! 📢
Venue will be at Aeroarts room! 🤸
Class is instructed by a few professionals from Studio Bodyrock!
Come and join us now! 🙆
#zumba #aerobicsclub_mmu #studiobodyrock

alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on January 19, 2020.

caption:
Hi guys!! With the recent updates on the spread of Covid-19, Malaysian Government had imposed a nationwide movement control order from 18 March 2020 until the end of the month to combat the sharp rise in the number of cases on the spread of Covid-19 in Malaysia.

During the duration of the lockdown, please do wash and sanitize your hands regularly.  Also, try to avoid going to public areas and social gatherings. Lastly, always remain calm and help those who are in need of help.

If you suspect to be infected with the virus and develop a fever or symptoms such as cough or difficulty breathing, please do distance yourself from others and call your healthcare provider for medical advice.

Do try your very best to stay clean and  healthy. 😷

#covid_19 #coronavirus #stayhealthy #staycalm
alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on March 17, 2020.

caption:
Hi guys! We are proud to announce the launch of our new logo as part of the ongoing evolution of MMU Aerobics Club.

Our club has grown and evolved over so many years, and now it is time for a change. We have altered our logo to reflect the club's dynamic future.

The new logo symbolizes wisdom, spiritual and well-being of our members and the future of the club.

In the upcoming years, we will be uploading all our fitness classes, activities and events with the new club logo. 
Thanks to everyone for your generous  support! 😊
alt: Photo by Aerobics Club on November 24, 2019.

caption:
Club and Society registration week is now back!

Date: 14 Jul 2020 - 16 Jul 2020

Although happening the pandemic Covid-19 in this year and all the classes is forces to close but we will organising an online event soon!
We are welcome those who haven't become Aerobic member to join us! Once you join as our member, the membership is remain as long as your whole MMU uni life. So, please do not hesitate to join us now. You can fill up the google form for registration purpose. Thank you!

Promotion Video Platform: OCTV FB Page (OCTV MULTIMEDIA UNIVERSITY MELAKA CAMPUS)
GOOGLE FORM: https://forms.gle/zh4WYgsMW4Mq2yks8

Finally end of first week classes. Thanks everyone for taking the effort to spend some time to join in with us. Hope you guys enjoy it! Do take a good rest and we'll see you guys in next week classes. 😉 Thank you! **We accept any recommendations or feedbacks to improve the classes for you guys to enjoy. Just command or pm us below and we will try our best to satisfy your needs. 😊

For those who have missed this week classes, no worries! You could replace the classes with other available classes next week, just inform us! We're very happy to have you to join in the classes! 🤗

caption:
Greetings from Aerobics Club MMU. We are here to invite you to our Annual General Meeting Year 2019! Below are the details of our AGM:

Date: 15/8/2019 (Thursday)
Time: 7pm
Venue: CDP 2023

This AGM is extremely important as we will introduce the roles of each division, the future events that will be organised in this academic year and the recruitment of sub-committees in the upcoming events. 
Besides, SAPS point will be given for those who attend this AGM and we will also provide refreshments to everyone present. Moreover, gaming sessions will be conducted to getting know each other better and you may have a chance to win mysterious prizes in our lucky draw sessions! 
We are looking forward to seeing you on that day! Thank you.

So, we will update you guys again. **Wear mask and drink lots of water. 😷
